headline: Sempra (SRE) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth

headline: SRE Stock Gets Mixed Analyst Update As Utilities Stay In Focus
summary: With a net profit margin of 13.1%, Sempra (NYSE:SRE) is among the 11 Most Profitable Renewable Energy Stocks Right Now. Sempra (NYSE:SRE) saw mixed analyst revisions on April 21, when Morgan Stanley lowered its price target to $104 from $105 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The firm was updating valuations across North American regulated and diversified utilities […]
